summary.en: Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) adopts BNS standards largely aligned with IEC/CISPR. Wireless devices must meet electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emission and immunity limits under BNS/IEC standards. India BIS influence is noted given Bhutan's special relationship with India; IEC-aligned standards are generally the reference. Test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are acceptable to BSB.
summary.zh: 不丹标准局（BSB）采用的BNS标准与IEC/CISPR标准大体一致。无线设备须符合BNS/IEC标准下的电磁兼容（EMC）辐射及抗扰度限值。鉴于不丹与印度的特殊关系，印度BIS标准具有一定影响力；以IEC标准为一般参考。国际认可实验室出具的检测报告可被BSB接受。
summary.zht: 不丹標準局（BSB）採用的BNS標準與IEC/CISPR標準大體一致。無線設備須符合BNS/IEC標準下的電磁相容（EMC）輻射及抗擾度限值。鑑於不丹與印度的特殊關係，印度BIS標準具有一定影響力；以IEC標準為一般參考。國際認可實驗室出具的檢測報告可被BSB接受。

standards_or_laws: BNS standards (Bhutan National Standards, IEC/ISO aligned)

summary.en: China requires EMC compliance under GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment emissions), GB/T 17618 (immunity), and related GB standards administered by SAMR and tested at CNAS-accredited labs. SRRC approval covers radio frequency compliance.
summary.zh: 中国要求符合GB/T 9254（信息技术设备辐射）、GB/T 17618（抗扰度）及市场监管总局（SAMR）主管的相关GB标准，并在CNAS认可实验室进行检测。SRRC核准涵盖无线电频率合规。
summary.zht: 中國要求符合GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備輻射）、GB/T 17618（抗擾度）及市場監管總局（SAMR）主管的相關GB標準，並在CNAS認可實驗室進行檢測。SRRC核准涵蓋無線電頻率合規。

standards_or_laws: SRRC frequency allocation and type approval

gap.en: GB EMC standards broadly align with IEC/CISPR but are not identical. Chinese test reports from CNAS labs may be accepted by BSB if the lab holds ILAC mutual recognition; confirm with BSB before relying on Chinese test data. SRRC approval does not transfer to Bhutan spectrum management.
gap.zh: GB EMC标准与IEC/CISPR标准大体一致但并非完全相同。若实验室持有ILAC互认资质，BSB可能接受CNAS实验室出具的中国检测报告；依赖中国检测数据前须先与BSB确认。SRRC核准不适用于不丹频谱管理。
gap.zht: GB EMC標準與IEC/CISPR標準大體一致但並非完全相同。若實驗室持有ILAC互認資質，BSB可能接受CNAS實驗室出具的中國檢測報告；依賴中國檢測數據前須先與BSB確認。SRRC核准不適用於不丹頻譜管理。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance under BNS/IEC-aligned standards is required for Bhutan market access. Existing GB-based EMC test reports may partially support BSB submissions if conducted at an ILAC MRA-recognised lab, but this must be confirmed with BSB directly before assuming equivalence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入不丹市场须符合BNS/IEC标准的EMC要求。若检测由ILAC MRA认可实验室进行，现有基于GB标准的EMC检测报告或可部分支持BSB申报，但在假设等效前须直接向BSB确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入不丹市場須符合BNS/IEC標準的EMC要求。若檢測由ILAC MRA認可實驗室進行，現有基於GB標準的EMC檢測報告或可部分支持BSB申報，但在假設等效前須直接向BSB確認。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Frequency Spectrum — 5 GHz Indoor Restriction
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频率频谱——5 GHz室内限制
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻率頻譜——5 GHz室內限制

summary.en: Bhutan applies a 5 GHz indoor-only restriction for certain Wi-Fi bands (particularly 5150–5350 MHz). Devices capable of outdoor operation in these bands must be configured or labelled as indoor-only. BICMA manages spectrum allocation under the Bhutan Information, Communications and Media Act 2018. Bhutan's internet infrastructure is heavily mediated through India's network, affecting frequency coordination.
summary.zh: 不丹对特定Wi-Fi频段（尤其是5150–5350 MHz）实施5 GHz室内限制。能够在上述频段室外使用的设备须配置为或标注为仅限室内使用。BICMA依据2018年《不丹信息、通信与媒体法》管理频谱分配。不丹互联网基础设施大量经由印度网络中转，影响频率协调。
summary.zht: 不丹對特定Wi-Fi頻段（尤其是5150–5350 MHz）實施5 GHz室內限制。能夠在上述頻段室外使用的設備須配置為或標註為僅限室內使用。BICMA依據2018年《不丹資訊、通訊與媒體法》管理頻譜分配。不丹互聯網基礎設施大量經由印度網絡中轉，影響頻率協調。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan Information, Communications and Media Act 2018
ITU Radio Regulations (Bhutan is ITU member)

summary.en: China (MIIT/SRRC) also applies indoor-only restrictions to 5150–5350 MHz Wi-Fi. The Chinese SRRC type approval encodes the permitted operating environment. Chinese devices for the 5 GHz band are generally certified indoor-only for these sub-bands already.
summary.zh: 中国（MIIT/SRRC）同样对5150–5350 MHz Wi-Fi频段实施室内限制。中国SRRC型号核准载明许可使用环境。中国5 GHz频段设备通常已就上述子频段取得室内限制认证。
summary.zht: 中國（MIIT/SRRC）同樣對5150–5350 MHz Wi-Fi頻段實施室內限制。中國SRRC型號核准載明許可使用環境。中國5 GHz頻段設備通常已就上述子頻段取得室內限制認證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — operating environment classification
MIIT frequency allocation table (5 GHz bands)

gap.en: While China and Bhutan share the 5150–5350 MHz indoor-only rule, Bhutanese BICMA must independently verify the device's spectrum compliance. Chinese SRRC approval documentation can be submitted to support the BICMA application but does not replace it. Labelling must reflect Bhutan's indoor restriction requirement.
gap.zh: 尽管中国和不丹均对5150–5350 MHz频段实施室内限制规定，不丹BICMA仍须独立核验设备的频谱合规性。可提交中国SRRC核准文件支持BICMA申请，但不能替代BICMA申请。标签须体现不丹室内限制要求。
gap.zht: 儘管中國和不丹均對5150–5350 MHz頻段實施室內限制規定，不丹BICMA仍須獨立核驗設備的頻譜合規性。可提交中國SRRC核准文件支持BICMA申請，但不能替代BICMA申請。標籤須體現不丹室內限制要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bhutan enforces a 5 GHz indoor-only restriction consistent with international practice. Devices must be configured and labelled for indoor use only in those sub-bands. This largely aligns with Chinese SRRC restrictions, but the BICMA approval process must still be completed independently.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不丹依照国际惯例对5 GHz频段实施室内限制。设备须在上述子频段配置并标注为仅限室内使用。此规定与中国SRRC限制大体一致，但仍须独立完成BICMA核准程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不丹依照國際慣例對5 GHz頻段實施室內限制。設備須在上述子頻段配置並標註為僅限室內使用。此規定與中國SRRC限制大體一致，但仍須獨立完成BICMA核准程序。
